item.title: Miri initialization error
item.body:
Although I've updated the code asterinas and miri as per the KernMiri artifacts, I got the Miri error when running osdk-based os:

for [myos](https://github.com/os-checker/myos) and `cargo osdk miri test`

```
thread 'rustc' (1928698) panicked at src/eval.rs:479:13:
Miri initialization error: UndefinedBehavior(PointerOutOfBounds { alloc_id: alloc81, alloc_size: Size(5 bytes), ptr_offset: 2147483648, inboun
ds_size: 5, msg: MemoryAccess })
stack backtrace:
   0:     0x722a77a716a3 - <<std[a281d47bcdda01fa]::sys::backtrace::BacktraceLock>::print::DisplayBacktrace as core[3c22d146b17900d2]::fmt::Di
splay>::fmt
   1:     0x722a78011648 - core[3c22d146b17900d2]::fmt::write
   2:     0x722a77a87ec6 - <std[a281d47bcdda01fa]::sys::stdio::unix::Stderr as std[a281d47bcdda01fa]::io::Write>::write_fmt

b79]::install_ice_hook::{closure#1}>>::{closure#0}
   6:     0x722a77a65852 - std[a281d47bcdda01fa]::panicking::panic_with_hook
   7:     0x722a77a47f28 - std[a281d47bcdda01fa]::panicking::panic_handler::{closure#0}

::{closure#0}, !>
   9:     0x722a77a49add - __rustc[1e670509d0475bac]::rust_begin_unwind
  10:     0x722a74c0dd5c - core[3c22d146b17900d2]::panicking::panic_fmt
  11:     0x5895a5fa71d8 - miri[b5848919a5dfaed7]::eval::eval_entry
  12:     0x5895a5d64e16 - <miri[f2d056576fa7e874]::MiriCompilerCalls as rustc_driver_impl[c62d54acffbb1b79]::Callbacks>::after_analysis
  13:     0x722a7931b033 - <rustc_interface[76fc95e16e4b83f8]::passes::create_and_enter_global_ctxt<core[3c22d146b17900d2]::option::Option<rus
tc_interface[76fc95e16e4b83f8]::queries::Linker>, rustc_driver_impl[c62d54acffbb1b79]::run_compiler::{closure#0}::{closure#2}>::{closure#2} as
 core[3c22d146b17900d2]::ops::function::FnOnce<(&rustc_session[ac8bf7f8d5234bcc]::session::Session, rustc_middle[e0114d918db60c17]::ty::contex
t::CurrentGcx, alloc[9d17511b3b4830f4]::sync::Arc<rustc_data_structures[def20a9c40e189d]::jobserver::Proxy>, &std[a281d47bcdda01fa]::sync::onc
e_lock::OnceLock<rustc_middle[e0114d918db60c17]::ty::context::GlobalCtxt>, &rustc_data_structures[def20a9c40e189d]::sync::worker_local::Worker
Local<rustc_middle[e0114d918db60c17]::arena::Arena>, &rustc_data_structures[def20a9c40e189d]::sync::worker_local::WorkerLocal<rustc_hir[a8f875
085b9e5248]::Arena>, rustc_driver_impl[c62d54acffbb1b79]::run_compiler::{closure#0}::{closure#2})>>::call_once::{shim:vtable#0}

in_thread_with_globals<rustc_interface[76fc95e16e4b83f8]::util::run_in_thread_pool_with_globals<rustc_interface[76fc95e16e4b83f8]::interface::
run_compiler<(), rustc_driver_impl[c62d54acffbb1b79]::run_compiler::{closure#0}>::{closure#1}, ()>::{closure#0}, ()>::{closure#0}::{closure#0}
, ()>

ith_globals<rustc_interface[76fc95e16e4b83f8]::util::run_in_thread_pool_with_globals<rustc_interface[76fc95e16e4b83f8]::interface::run_compile

sure#1} as core[3c22d146b17900d2]::ops::function::FnOnce<()>>::call_once::{shim:vtable#0}
  17:     0x722a79116ab8 - <std[a281d47bcdda01fa]::sys::thread::unix::Thread>::new::thread_start
  18:     0x722a72c9caa4 - start_thread
                               at ./nptl/pthread_create.c:447:8
  19:     0x722a72d29c6c - clone3
                               at ./misc/../sysdeps/unix/sysv/linux/x86_64/clone3.S:78:0
  20:                0x0 - <unknown>
```
